task: Find the tech specs of the MacBook Pro 16-inch introduced in November 2023.
final_result_response:
I have all the information needed. Let me now submit the comprehensive tech specs.

Here are the complete tech specs for the **MacBook Pro (16-inch, Nov 2023)** from Apple's official support page (https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737):

**Finish:** Space Black, Silver

**Chip:**
- **Apple M3 Pro:** 12-core CPU (6 performance + 6 efficiency), 18-core GPU, hardware-accelerated ray tracing, 16-core Neural Engine, 150GB/s memory bandwidth
- **Apple M3 Max:** 14-core CPU (10 perf + 4 eff) or 16-core CPU (12 perf + 4 eff), 30-core or 40-core GPU, hardware-accelerated ray tracing, 16-core Neural Engine, 300GB/s memory bandwidth
- Both include Media Engine with hardware-accelerated H.264, HEVC, ProRes, ProRes RAW, and AV1 decode

**Display:** 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, 3456×2234 native resolution at 254 ppi, 1,000,000:1 contrast ratio, XDR brightness 1000 nits sustained / 1600 nits peak (HDR), SDR 600 nits, 1 billion colors, Wide color (P3), True Tone, ProMotion up to 120Hz

**Memory:**
- M3 Pro: 18GB unified memory (configurable to 36GB)
- M3 Max: 36GB unified memory (configurable up to 128GB)

**Storage:**
- M3 Pro: 512GB SSD (configurable to 1TB, 2TB, 4TB; 8TB with M3 Max)
- M3 Max: 1TB SSD (configurable to 2TB, 4TB, 8TB)

**Battery & Power:** Up to 22 hours Apple TV movie playback, up to 15 hours wireless web, 100Wh lithium-polymer battery, 140W USB-C Power Adapter, MagSafe 3, fast-charge capable

**Ports:** SDXC card slot, HDMI port, 3.5mm headphone jack, MagSafe 3 port, three Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C) ports (up to 40Gb/s)

**Wireless:** Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), Bluetooth 5.3

**Camera:** 1080p FaceTime HD camera

**Audio:** Six-speaker sound system with force-cancelling woofers, Spatial Audio with Dolby Atmos, studio-quality three-mic array

**Keyboard & Trackpad:** Backlit Magic Keyboard with Touch ID, Force Touch trackpad

**Size:** 0.66 × 14.01 × 9.77 inches (1.68 × 35.57 × 24.81 cm)

**Weight:** 4.7 lbs (2.14 kg) M3 Pro / 4.8 lbs (2.16 kg) M3 Max

**OS:** macOS (ships with macOS Sonoma, supports macOS Sequoia)

The full specs page is available at: https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737
